name: Format test — Inline comments ONLY
hypothesis: Inline comments are sufficient breadcrumbs on their own, without a DECISION.md file.

setup.description: v10 code with inline WHY comments. No DECISION.md. Standard autoresearch.md and results.jsonl.

stimulus.system_prompt: You are resuming an autoresearch session to optimize string_pipeline.py for minimum latency.
